weather.headline: Red Flag Warning issued May 16 at 1:49AM MST until May 17 at 11:00PM MST by NWS Tucson AZ
weather.areaDesc: Eastern Pima-Southeastern Pinal-Santa Cruz-Western Cochise; Southern Graham-Central and Eastern Cochise-Southern Greenlee-Lower Elevations of the San Carlos Apache Nation in Graham County; Northern Graham-Northern Greenlee-White and Gila Mountains; Mountains above 5500 feet
